Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"7ea6399b-2b1f-4c3a-9cc2-70306339b6a2"},"authorEmail":"Bars.Ruth@aut.bme.hu","authorName":"R Bars and G Max","authorOrganization":"Budapest University of Technology and Econ","description":"The purpose of PoleReplacement.mlapp file is to define the continuous or the discrete PID controllers for a given plant (G(s)) using the pole replacement method. By this method the transfer function of the continuous or the discrete controller can be determined easily and quickly. The PID controller algorithm applies the pole cancellation method.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"570a937e-7dc4-451e-bf4f-15676f04b235"},"outputFileName":"Poleplacement.mltbx","outputFolder":"/control101/poleplacement/matlabCode","summary":"The purpose of this file is to define the continuous or the discrete PID controllers using the pole placement.","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_d2639e1d-24f0-4774-b4ed-ce5acb0674d4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"4aa74297-733b-4a67-8403-9a72486b3854"},"toolboxName":"Poleplacement","toolboxVersion":"1.0","uniqueId":"e8b6d4ba-2d3a-4df0-9e7e-451eb1d867af"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"e47761bf-f7c6-4eef-8d84-8e1436e9612c"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
